Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment to transition to Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment across all cases before reaching Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the subsequent occurrence of Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment when it directly precedes Completed + In Call in a variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time from case start until Queued + Awaiting Assignment is performed, specifically in variants that eventually include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur without intermediate waiting states
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment grouped by country, considering only traces that lead to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that contain Completed + In Call versus variants that end in Completed + Resolved without Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Cycle time of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in process instances that include Completed + In Call as an intermediate activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and activity Completed + In Call for cases where activity Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + In Call when Queued + Awaiting Assignment appears multiple times in the same trace
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment to be followed by Completed + In Call in high-frequency variants (e.g., top 5 most frequent variants containing both)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that loop back to Queued + Awaiting Assignment before reaching Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + In Call when the path includes Accepted + Wait - User
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment across all occurrences in traces that terminate with Completed + Closed after passing through Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Elapsed time between the first occurrence of Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the first occurrence of Completed + In Call in multi-occurrence scenarios
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'
